image.characterName: アクター HK_女武闘家01-1

parameters: \n< Adventurer >Ah, there we go...

\n< Adventurer >I feel like I spend more time climbing up and down
mountain paths for the purpose of monster
extermination.
\n< Adventurer >Maybe I should just live in the mountains.

\n< Adventurer >This is what they call the Carriage Breaker Hill.
The slope is steep, so it's tough for carriages to
pass through.

\n< Adventurer >You know, my dream is to gradually level this hill
and make it a gentler slope.

\n< Adventurer >If we do that, the view from the castle will be
even better...
It's a signboard.

I guess it's just something that gets rained on by
the rain and blown by the wind. It's difficult to
distinguish the characters.
\n< Serena >It's a barrel.

\n< Serena >I wonder if a passing carriage dropped it. It
seems to be empty inside.
\n< Serena >It's a tree stump.

\n< Serena >It must be quite a challenge to gather firewood
with so many monsters appearing.

\n< Serena >Before winter comes, we need to reduce the
strength of the monsters and allow people to enter
the mountains so that the town doesn't freeze.
\n< Serena >It's truly a matter of life and death.
\n< Serena >Firewood.

\n< Serena >You must not touch firewood in places like this
without caution. It could be the town's property,
after all.

events.name: フィールドマップ　リージョン用

parameters:
\n< Serena >So this is the mountain climbing path. If we go
right, we'll head towards the neighboring country.
It seems like the monsters are in this direction
of the mountain.
